caption: A man wearing black headphones and a black long-sleeved shirt is positioned in front of a professional condenser microphone mounted on a black boom arm. He is situated in a studio setting characterized by a dark, textured acoustic foam wall with a ribbed pattern. As the sequence progresses, the man maintains a relatively stationary position while speaking, though his facial expressions shift slightly. He looks upward and to the side with a focused expression, then shifts his gaze forward and slightly downward. His mouth moves in a speaking motion throughout the clip, and his eyebrows subtly lift and lower as he communicates. The camera remains in a static medium close-up shot, focusing on his head and shoulders, with no on-screen text or logos visible.
